scripts.dev:cloudflare:named: concurrently -k -n "vite,tunnel" -c "cyan,magenta" "vite --strictPort" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5183 && cloudflared tunnel --config cloudflared/config.yml run"
scripts.deploy:cf-pages: npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=freekit-roi-simulator
scripts.preview:cloudflare: concurrently -k -n "preview,tunnel" -c "cyan,magenta" "vite preview --port 4173 --strictPort" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:4173 && cloudflared tunnel --url http://127.0.0.1:4173"
